message:
Add final evidence packs for phase2c packets FR-P2C-002 and FR-P2C-003

Complete the conformance evidence pipeline for two phase2c packets by
authoring final parity reports, fixture manifests, parity gates, and
RaptorQ durability proof artifacts.

FR-P2C-002 (bd-2wb.13.9) — Parser contract mismatches:
- contract_table.md: Appended "Implemented final evidence pack" section
  documenting the fixture manifest, parity gate, parity report with
  READY_FOR_IMPL readiness, RaptorQ decode-proof chain, and replay
  commands for schema/readiness validation.
- risk_note.md: Appended matching "Implemented packet-002 final parity +
  durability artifacts" section with final manifest paths, hardened
  policy (non_allowlisted_action=fail_closed), and deterministic
  decode reason code (raptorq.decode_verified).
- New files: fixture_manifest.json, parity_gate.yaml,
  parity_report.json (readiness=READY_FOR_IMPL, missing_mandatory_fields=[]),
  parity_report.raptorq.json, parity_report.decode_proof.json.

FR-P2C-003 (bd-2wb.14.9) — Alien-graveyard recommendation contracts:
- contract_table.md: Appended "Implemented final evidence pack" section
  with identical artifact structure as FR-P2C-002.
- risk_note.md: Appended "Implemented packet-003 final parity +
  durability artifacts" section.
- New files: fixture_manifest.json, parity_gate.yaml,
  parity_report.json, parity_report.raptorq.json,
  parity_report.decode_proof.json.

Both packets now have complete evidence chains suitable for
implementation readiness gating via the phase2c_schema_gate binary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,6 +72,21 @@ All parser contract mismatches or reject paths must emit:
 - Hardened unit/property replay: `FR_MODE=hardened FR_SEED=42 rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture fr_p2c_002_f_adversarial_runtime_parse_failures_emit_stable_reason_code`
 - E2E replay: `FR_MODE=hardened FR_SEED=42 rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance --test smoke -- --nocapture fr_p2c_002_e2e_contract_smoke`
 
+## Implemented final evidence pack (bd-2wb.13.9)
+
+- Packet final manifest + parity gate authored in `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/{fixture_manifest.json,parity_gate.yaml}`.
+- Packet parity report finalized in `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/parity_report.json` with:
+  - `readiness=READY_FOR_IMPL`
+  - `missing_mandatory_fields=[]`
+  - explicit unit/differential/e2e/optimization evidence IDs.
+- Durability sidecar + decode-proof artifacts finalized in:
+  - `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/parity_report.raptorq.json`
+  - `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/parity_report.decode_proof.json`
+  - reason code: `raptorq.decode_verified`
+  - replay command: `./scripts/run_raptorq_artifact_gate.sh --run-id local-smoke`
+- Packet schema/readiness replay:
+  - `rch exec -- cargo run -p fr-conformance --bin phase2c_schema_gate -- crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002`
+
 ## Traceability checklist
 
 - Every row `C01..C10` maps to at least one unit and one e2e ID.

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+strict:
+  packet_id: FR-P2C-002
+  conformance_drift: 0
+  required_reason_codes:
+    - parity_ok
+    - journey_ok
+hardened:
+  allowed_deviation_classes:
+    - BoundedParserDiagnostics
+    - MetadataSanitization
+    - ResourceClamp
+  non_allowlisted_action: fail_closed
+artifacts:
+  fixture_manifest: fixture_manifest.json
+  parity_report: parity_report.json
+  raptorq_sidecar: parity_report.raptorq.json
+  decode_proof: parity_report.decode_proof.json

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "fr_phase2c_packet_v1",
+  "packet_id": "FR-P2C-002",
+  "readiness": "READY_FOR_IMPL",
+  "missing_mandatory_fields": [],
+  "strict_mode": {
+    "status": "pass",
+    "summary": "RESP2 parser framing and consumed-length contracts are deterministic and parity-aligned for packet scope."
+  },
+  "hardened_mode": {
+    "status": "pass",
+    "summary": "Only allowlisted bounded parser defenses are permitted; non-allowlisted deviations are rejected fail-closed."
+  },
+  "evidence": {
+    "unit_property": [
+      "fr_p2c_002_u001_scalar_decode_parity",
+      "fr_p2c_002_u003_array_recursion_parity_property",
+      "fr_p2c_002_u007_resp3_fail_closed_prefix_matrix",
+      "fr_p2c_002_u009_consumed_length_exactness_property",
+      "fr_p2c_002_u013_hardened_gate_rejects_non_allowlisted_parser_drift"
+    ],
+    "differential": [
+      "fr_p2c_002_f_differential_protocol_fixture_passes",
+      "fr_p2c_002_f_metamorphic_protocol_fixture_runs_are_deterministic",
+      "fr_p2c_002_f_adversarial_runtime_parse_failures_emit_stable_reason_code"
+    ],
+    "e2e": [
+      "fr_p2c_002_e2e_contract_smoke"
+    ],
+    "optimization": [
+      "LEV-002-OPT-01_directory_scan_bitmask",
+      "phase2c_gate_round_dir_scan_mask_isomorphism_check"
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -53,6 +53,23 @@ All parser threat detections/rejections/recoveries must include:
 - `replay_cmd`
 - `artifact_refs`
 
+## Implemented packet-002 final parity + durability artifacts (bd-2wb.13.9)
+
+- Final packet manifest + gate policy published:
+  - `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/fixture_manifest.json`
+  - `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/parity_gate.yaml`
+  - hardened policy keeps `non_allowlisted_action=fail_closed`.
+- Final packet parity report published:
+  - `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/parity_report.json`
+  - readiness set to `READY_FOR_IMPL` with no missing mandatory fields.
+- RaptorQ proof chain published:
+  - `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/parity_report.raptorq.json`
+  - `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002/parity_report.decode_proof.json`
+  - deterministic decode reason code: `raptorq.decode_verified`
+  - replay command: `./scripts/run_raptorq_artifact_gate.sh --run-id local-smoke`
+- Replay validation command:
+  - `rch exec -- cargo run -p fr-conformance --bin phase2c_schema_gate -- crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/phase2c/FR-P2C-002`
+
 ## Expected-loss decision model
 
 ### States

@@ -90,6 +90,21 @@ Each contract-row verification event (pass/fail/drift) must emit:
 - Integration/E2E: `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture FR_P2C_003`
 - Packet schema gate: `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture phase2c`

+- Packet schema/readiness replay:
